skill.name: minimax-music-playlist
skill.description: Generate personalized music playlists by analyzing the user's music taste and generation feedback history. Triggers on any request involving playlist generation, music taste profiling, or personalized music recommendations. Supports multilingual triggers — match equivalent phrases in any language.
skill.summary: AI-powered playlist generator that analyzes your music taste and creates personalized playlists with original AI-generated songs.
skill.author: MiniMax-AI

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported 85 patterns across external_commands (66), network (3), filesystem (1), and blocker categories (18). All findings are FALSE POSITIVES. The 66 external_commands detections are markdown backtick-formatted CLI instructions in SKILL.md, not Ruby/shell code execution. The 3 network URLs point to legitimate services (Spotify privacy page, MusicBrainz public API). The 15 blocker findings for weak cryptography and 3 for system reconnaissance have no corresponding code — there is no cryptographic or reconnaissance logic in this skill document. The skill legitimately executes external commands (mmx CLI, osascript, media players) and accesses the filesystem and network for its core functionality.

low_findings.title: External Command Execution via CLI Tools
low_findings.description: The skill instructs the AI agent to execute multiple external commands: mmx CLI (music and image generation), osascript (Apple Music queries), find (file search), open (URL opening), and media players (mpv, ffplay, afplay). All commands serve legitimate purposes for playlist generation. No user input is passed to commands in a way that enables injection.

low_findings.title: Network Requests to External Services
low_findings.description: The skill directs the AI to open the Spotify privacy settings page for user data export and query the MusicBrainz public API for artist genre information. Both are legitimate services with no sensitive data exposure risk.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Read and Write Operations
low_findings.description: The skill reads user music data from the home directory (Spotify exports, Apple Music) and writes generated playlists and taste profiles to ~/Music/minimax-gen/ and <SKILL_DIR>/data/. These operations are necessary for the skill core functionality and use standard user-accessible paths.

content.value_statement: Music platforms do not generate custom songs for your personal taste. This skill analyzes your listening history and creates original AI-generated playlists that match your preferences.
actual_capabilities: Scan Apple Music and Spotify data to build a personalized music taste profile
Generate original AI music tracks using the MiniMax mmx CLI tool
Create matching album cover art for generated playlists
Play generated playlists through local audio players (mpv, ffplay, afplay)
Save playlist metadata and incorporate user feedback to improve future recommendations
limitations: Requires the mmx CLI tool to be installed and authenticated with a MiniMax API key
Song generation requires an active MiniMax API connection and account
Spotify data requires a manual privacy export that takes several days to process
Generated music is AI-created and may not match commercial audio quality

use_cases.title: Personal Playlist Creation
use_cases.description: Create custom AI-generated playlists based on your listening history and musical preferences across Apple Music and Spotify.

use_cases.title: Event Soundtrack Generation
use_cases.description: Generate themed playlists for parties, workouts, or relaxation sessions with a specific mood and genre mix.

use_cases.title: Music Discovery
use_cases.description: Discover new musical styles by generating playlists that blend your existing tastes with complementary genres.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Playlist
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a playlist based on my music taste
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants a quick personalized playlist without specifying details

prompt_templates.title: Themed Playlist
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a rainy day jazz playlist with 8 songs based on my listening history
prompt_templates.scenario: User has a specific mood, genre, and song count in mind

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Source Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Scan my Apple Music and Spotify data, build a taste profile, and create a workout playlist
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants comprehensive analysis across multiple music sources

prompt_templates.title: Replay Previous Playlist
prompt_templates.prompt: Play the last playlist you generated for me
prompt_templates.scenario: User wants to replay an existing previously generated playlist

output_examples.input: Create a late night chill playlist based on my taste
output: Sources: Apple Music 230 tracks | Spotify 140 tracks
Genres: J-pop 20% | R&B 15% | Classical 10% | Indie Pop 9%
Playlist Plan: Late Night Chill (5 songs)

best_practices: Provide your Spotify data export before running the skill for the most accurate taste profile analysis
Specify a clear theme or mood when requesting a playlist to receive better matching results
Give feedback on generated songs to improve future playlist recommendations from your taste profile
anti_patterns: Do not share your mmx API key in the chat. Authenticate separately using mmx auth login
Avoid running the skill without reviewing the playlist plan first, as song generation takes time and API resources
Do not store generated playlists in shared directories because they contain personal taste data

faq.question: What is the mmx CLI tool?
faq.answer: The mmx CLI is the MiniMax command-line tool for music and image generation. Install it with npm install -g mmx-cli and authenticate with mmx auth login --api-key.

faq.question: How does the skill access my Spotify data?
faq.answer: The skill does not connect to Spotify directly. It searches your computer for Spotify data exports that you requested through the Spotify privacy settings page.

faq.question: Can I use this skill without Apple Music or Spotify?
faq.answer: Yes. You can describe your music taste manually and the skill will build a profile from your description.

faq.question: How many songs does the skill generate per playlist?
faq.answer: The default is 5 songs. You can specify a different number in your request.

faq.question: Where are the generated files stored?
faq.answer: Generated playlists are saved to ~/Music/minimax-gen/playlists/ with a folder named after your playlist theme.

faq.question: Can I replay a previously generated playlist?
faq.answer: Yes. Ask the skill to play a previous playlist and it will show your available playlists for selection.
